messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset.

Question asked: Based on the logs so far, are there any concerning patterns in service health?

Finding to evaluate: geo-lookup API latency increasing

Response A:
Geo-lookup latency has been gradually increasing. Service-B retry rates are slightly elevated. No user-facing impact yet but worth monitoring.

Response B:
I wasn’t able to locate any service‑health‑related log entries in the memory store. Searches for terms such as “service health”, “error”, “incident”, “log”, “service”, and “latency” all returned no results, indicating that no relevant log documents are currently available in the system. Consequently, I can’t identify any concerning patterns in service health based on the logs we have.

Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording.

Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE
/no_think
